pages.raw_text:
In answer to the suit brought
against the Northern Pacific by
Joseph Boyd to recover $75,529.57
the defendant corporation has en-


tered specific denial to all allega
tons of fraud. Action was begun to
recover on a judgment against the
Occur d'Alene Railroad & Naviga.
ton Co., and a fraudulent transfer
of the stock of this company from
ID. c. Corbin to the Northern Pa
cific was alleged in the complaint
by which the Northern Pacific was
brought into the action. That the
road was sold to the defendant for
less than it's value, and excess
stock used in payment, is also de-
MED. A claim is set UP that Boyd
is barred from action against the
Northern Pacific by reason of fail
ure to enforce collection of his
judgment against the property in
when the suit was ter.
minated. The case has been sre-
moved to the U. S, circuit court.
